releaseNotes:
What’s New in 2026:
- 2026 edition update
- Performance optimizations
- Rankings: added filters by favorites and nationalities

Race Center:
- Added 9 new languages: Slovenian, Slovak, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Norwegian, Italian, Portuguese, and Swedish
- Added estimated rider passing times at key points along the route
- Ability to ask questions to our experts
sellerName: Amaury Sport Organisation A S O
description:
Step into the heart of the Tour de France with the official Tour de France app presented by ŠKODA!

The Tour de France brings you even more content so you can experience the rhythm of the Grande Boucle all year round! It also gives you the chance to become part of the race through the Tour de France Club!

Download the app so you never miss a moment of the Tour de France throughout the year.

Get ready for the race and each stage with insights from our experts, discover the teams and routes, follow all the latest race news and every stage live with our interactive Race Center, check the official standings, immerse yourself in the race with all our videos - including extended highlights - play Fantasy by Tissot, and vote for the Century 21 Combativity Award!

What’s New in 2026
- 2026 edition update
- Performance optimizations
- Rankings: added filters by favorites and nationalities

Race Center
- Added 9 new languages: Slovenian, Slovak, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Norwegian, Italian, Portuguese, and Swedish
- Added estimated rider passing times at key points along the route
- Ability to ask questions to our experts

Get ready for all the stages
- Presentation of the stages with profiles and maps
- Video briefing of the stage by the sports direction
- Stage schedule
- Detailed team and rider profiles
- Tips for coming to each stage, following the Tour Caravan, and coming to the Fan Parks
- Cultural information on all departure and arrival cities

Follow every stage live with the Race Center by Capgemini
- Real-time rider positions and live rankings
- Stage data
- Live commentary from our experts
- Stage videos and photos: near live, last kilometer, highlights, and more
- Radio Tour featuring official information from race management via live audio
- Interactive mode to chat with our experts, take part in quizzes and polls, follow your Fantasy players, and vote for the Century 21 Combativity Award
- Personalized notifications
- Available in 13 languages: French, English, Spanish, German, Slovenian, Slovak, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Norwegian, Italian, Portuguese, and Swedish

Relive all stages
- Summary of the day and long video summary
- Last KM video
- Short videos of moments from the stage
- Interviews
- Classifications
- All the best photos from the stage

Join the cast of the Tour de France
- Join the Tour de France Club
- Play Fantasy by Tissot
- Vote for the Century 21 Combativity Award
- Guess the winner of the day
- Ask our experts your questions
- Listen to Radio Tour
- Enter the contests for a chance to win Tour de France prizes
- Discover and download the official loops of the Tour de France route

In the Preferences Center, complete your profile and configure your notifications.
